meta.name: Cyber Security
meta.description: Cyber security concepts, attacks, defenses, personas.
invariants: Security events are auditable and attributable.
Resilience against adversarial action is inherent.

symbols.name: Cyber Security Personas Lattice
symbols.role: Aggregates all security-related personas and roles.
symbols.failure_mode: Undefined roles, operational gaps.

symbols.name: CVE Data Enrichment
symbols.role: Fetches and parses detailed vulnerability information.
symbols.failure_mode: Unavailable authoritative sources.

symbols.name: Risk: Critical Vulnerabilities in ChurchCRM
symbols.role: Identifies critical SQL Injection and RCE vulnerabilities in ChurchCRM.
symbols.failure_mode: Underestimation of impact.

symbols.name: Continual Auditing
symbols.role: Ongoing post-deployment security assurance process.
symbols.failure_mode: Alert fatigue, false positives, blind spots.

symbols.name: Issue Security Requirements
symbols.role: Formalizing and issuing explicit security requirements.
symbols.failure_mode: Ambiguous requirements, unacknowledged mandates.

symbols.name: Requirement: Detection Telemetry for High-Sev Threats
symbols.role: Defines data streams required to detect active exploitation of high-severity threats.
symbols.failure_mode: Log truncation, encrypted payload blindness, insufficient retention.

symbols.name: Attack: Keylogger
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of keystroke logging malware.
activation_conditions: Detect and block unauthorized I/O hooks.
symbols.failure_mode: Captures keystrokes to steal data.

symbols.name: Defense: Key I/O Monitoring
symbols.role: Represents the defense mechanism of monitoring and blocking unauthorized input/output hooks.
activation_conditions: Monitor I/O and kill malicious hooks.
symbols.failure_mode: Detect abnormal I/O hooks; block unauthorized processes.

symbols.name: Attack: Session Hijack
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of stealing active session tokens.
activation_conditions: Concurrent login sessions from divergent locations
symbols.failure_mode: Takes over active authenticated session to impersonate user.

symbols.name: Attack: Rootkit Implant
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of deep system compromise via rootkit.
symbols.failure_mode: Low-level malicious implant hiding processes/files.

symbols.name: Defense: Exfiltration Block
symbols.role: Represents the defense mechanism of blocking unauthorized egress channels.
activation_conditions: Deny risky destinations; enable DLP rules.
symbols.failure_mode: Egress channels stay open; leakage continues

symbols.name: Defense: Least Privilege Review
symbols.role: Represents the defense mechanism of reviewing and enforcing least privilege.
activation_conditions: Reconcile roles to duties; log deltas.
symbols.failure_mode: Excess roles/permissions remain active

symbols.name: Attack: Zero-Day Exploit
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of exploiting zero-day vulnerabilities.
activation_conditions: Anomalous system behavior with no known signature
symbols.failure_mode: Exploits unknown/unpatched vulnerability.

symbols.name: Attack: Open Redirect
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of using open redirects for phishing or malware distribution.
symbols.failure_mode: Redirect endpoint forwards to attacker-controlled symbol_domain

symbols.name: Attack: API Rate Limit Bypass
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of circumventing API rate limits.
activation_conditions: High volume API requests from distributed IPs
Aggregate identity across edges; enforce adaptive limits.
symbols.failure_mode: Distributed or crafted calls evade throttling

symbols.name: Attack: Business Email Compromise
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of compromising business email accounts for fraud.
symbols.failure_mode: Trusted mailbox used for fraudulent instructions

symbols.name: Attack: Mobile App Tampering
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of modifying mobile applications or their runtime environment.
activation_conditions: Verify app signatures; detect runtime hooking.
symbols.failure_mode: Application modified/instrumented post-distribution

symbols.name: Attack: Firmware Tampering
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of altering device firmware for persistence or control.
activation_conditions: Attest firmware; restore from trusted image.
symbols.failure_mode: Device firmware altered to persist foothold

symbols.name: Attack: Shadow IT Adoption
symbols.role: Represents the risk vector of unauthorized software or service usage.
activation_conditions: Data storage in personal cloud accounts
Discover SaaS usage; broker sanctioned alternatives.
symbols.failure_mode: Unapproved external services handle sensitive data

symbols.name: Attack: Data Poisoning
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of corrupting training data to compromise AI models.
activation_conditions: Verify dataset lineage; quarantine suspect subsets.
symbols.failure_mode: Training or analytic data subtly corrupted

symbols.name: Attack: Typosquatted Package
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of registering similarly named packages to trick users.
activation_conditions: Installation of packages with similar names to popular ones
symbols.failure_mode: Malicious dependency mimics popular package

symbols.name: Attack: CI/CD Secret Leak
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of leaking secrets through CI/CD pipelines.
symbols.failure_mode: Build pipeline exposes credentials/artifacts

symbols.name: Attack: Weak Cipher Usage
symbols.role: Represents the risk vector of using weak or obsolete cryptographic ciphers.
activation_conditions: Enforce modern cipher suites; disable legacy.
symbols.failure_mode: Obsolete/weak crypto enables interception

symbols.name: Attack: Insecure Deserialization
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of exploiting insecure deserialization flaws.
symbols.failure_mode: Untrusted serialized input leads to code execution

symbols.name: Attack: Path Traversal
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of accessing unauthorized files via directory traversal.
activation_conditions: Access to files outside web root
Manipulation of file paths in requests
symbols.failure_mode: User input escapes intended directory constraints

symbols.name: Attack: Token Replay
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of replaying valid tokens to gain unauthorized access.
activation_conditions: Reuse of expired or stolen tokens
Bind tokens to context; shorten TTL; rotate.
symbols.failure_mode: Captured tokens reused within validity window

symbols.name: Attack: Webhook Abuse
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of manipulating or spoofing webhooks.
activation_conditions: Sign webhooks; check origin and intent.
symbols.failure_mode: External callbacks used to inject unauthorized actions

symbols.name: Attack: Log Forgery
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of falsifying or deleting log entries.
symbols.failure_mode: Adversary crafts entries to mislead audits

symbols.name: Attack: TOCTOU Race Condition
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of Time-of-Check to Time-of-Use race conditions.
activation_conditions: Lock around checks; re-validate before use.
symbols.failure_mode: State changes between check and use enable exploitation

symbols.name: Attack: Fractal Loop
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of a self-reinforcing, recursive anomaly.
activation_conditions: Apply dampening triad; enforce finite state.
symbols.failure_mode: Self-reinforcing anomaly resists termination; grows recursively

symbols.name: Defense: Shadow Illumination
symbols.role: Represents the defense mechanism of exposing and dismantling hidden environments.
activation_conditions: Force render to public lattice; tag artifacts.
symbols.failure_mode: Covert space remains dark; hidden runtime persists

symbols.name: Attack: Watering Hole
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of compromising sites frequented by targets.
symbols.failure_mode: Compromises site visited by targets to deliver malware.

symbols.name: Defense: Site Hygiene
symbols.role: Represents the defense mechanism of enforcing hygiene on accessed sites.
symbols.failure_mode: Patch browsers/apps; block bad symbol_domains.

symbols.name: Infrastructure Risk Lattice破
symbols.role: Systematically identifies and ranks risks within cloud and network infrastructure.

facets.function: Identify and categorize risks within systemic infrastructure.
facets.commit: New lattice synthesized for infrastructure risk grouping.

activation_conditions: During cloud or network infrastructure audits.
To evaluate risk across systemic service configurations.
symbols.failure_mode: Audit blindness leading to undetected exposure in secondary services.

symbols.name: Cyber Security Vulnerabilities Lattice
symbols.role: Aggregates all identified vulnerabilities and risks.
symbols.failure_mode: Unpatched vulnerabilities, ignored risks.

symbols.name: Credential Stuffing
symbols.role: detection
symbols.failure_mode: Stolen credentials reused at scale

symbols.name: Vulnerability: OpenShift GitOps Cluster Takeover
symbols.role: Represents a critical vulnerability (CVSS 9.1) in OpenShift GitOps.
symbols.failure_mode: Unpatched systems, widespread cluster takeovers.

symbols.name: Vulnerability: Growatt Solar Inverter Backdoors
symbols.role: Represents critical backdoors in Growatt ShineLan-X solar inverters.
symbols.failure_mode: Grid manipulation, device bricking, unauthorized access.

symbols.name: CVE-2025-12972: Fluent Bit RCE
symbols.role: Critical RCE vulnerability in Fluent Bit.
symbols.failure_mode: Full container escape; cloud environment takeover.

symbols.name: CVE-2025-66516: Apache Tika XXE
symbols.role: XXE vulnerability in Apache Tika.
symbols.failure_mode: Server-side request forgery; sensitive file disclosure.

symbols.name: Nuclei CVE Template Pattern
symbols.role: Standardized YAML-based signature for detecting CVEs.
symbols.failure_mode: false_positive_match

symbols.name: CVE to Source Code Workflow
symbols.role: End-to-end process for tracing a CVE to its source code commit.
symbols.failure_mode: Broken link in analysis chain.

symbols.name: Risk: Cisco Zero-Day Exploited by Chinese Hackers
symbols.role: Identifies a critical zero-day vulnerability in Cisco products.
symbols.failure_mode: False attribution.

symbols.name: Pattern Hunter
symbols.role: Proactive anomaly hunter specializing in detecting faint distortions and precursors to fractal loops.

persona.function: Proactively scans symbolic fields for faint distortions and early signals of anomaly before they harden into threats.

activation_conditions: Find the faint warp; move first.
symbols.failure_mode: Early signals ignored; distortion hardens into fractal loops.

symbols.name: Initial Access Vectors Map
symbols.role: Aggregates initial entry vectors for surface analysis and defensive prioritization.

facets.function: Group and analyze initial entry vectors.
facets.commit: New lattice synthesized for access vector grouping.

activation_conditions: To evaluate the risk of initial entry via various vectors.
symbols.failure_mode: Missing new or emerging entry vectors in the map.

symbols.name: Behavioral Analysis Lattice
symbols.role: Monitors and analyzes symbolic behavior to detect deviations from established baselines.

facets.function: Govern the detection of deviations from baseline symbolic behavior.
facets.commit: Refactored for behavioral synthesis and canonical ID.

activation_conditions: To detect anomalies in user or system behavior post-authentication.
When signature-based detection fails to identify stealthy or novel attacks.
symbols.failure_mode: False positives from legitimate drift; failure to detect slow, subtle compromise.

symbols.name: Persona: High-Risk Systems Administrator
symbols.role: Describes the behavioral patterns of a systems administrator who bypasses established policies for code review and security, deploying unauthorized code to production.
symbols.failure_mode: Erosion of trust, disciplinary action, systemic instability.

symbols.name: Persona: The Pentester-Advocate
symbols.role: Describes the role of a security professional who not only discovers and demonstrates vulnerabilities but also effectively advocates for their remediation, often through direct exploitation demonstrations.
activation_conditions: Advocacy for remediation via exploit proof.
symbols.failure_mode: Ineffective communication, unconvincing demonstrations, resistance from development teams, perceived as adversarial.

symbols.name: Attack: Mirror Spoof
symbols.role: Detects false mirrors and identity spoofing attempts.
symbols.failure_mode: False mirror impersonates trusted object; trust misdirected

symbols.name: Defense: Mirror Resonance Check
symbols.role: Cross-verifies identity and revokes forged trust.
symbols.failure_mode: False mirror not collapsed; impersonation continues

symbols.name: Defense: Supply Chain Verification
symbols.role: Verifies the integrity and provenance of all incoming artifacts.
symbols.failure_mode: Compromised upstream remains trusted

symbols.name: Attack: Supply Chain Compromise
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of compromise via upstream software dependencies.
symbols.failure_mode: Upstream dependency injects compromise

symbols.name: Attack: Cloud Misconfiguration
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of insecure cloud infrastructure configuration.
symbols.failure_mode: Cloud boundary exposes internal objects

symbols.name: Defense: Boundary Hardening
symbols.role: Audits and enforces strict boundary permissions.
symbols.failure_mode: Cloud access remains overexposed

symbols.name: Attack: Privilege Escalation
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of unauthorized elevation of access privileges.
activation_conditions: Access to restricted resources by non-admin
symbols.failure_mode: Unauthorized privileges persist; crown jewels exposed

symbols.name: Defense: Privilege Review
symbols.role: Revokes unauthorized access and enforces least privilege.
symbols.failure_mode: Escalated access not revoked

symbols.name: Attack: SQL Injection
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of SQL injection attacks.
activation_conditions: WAF alerts for SQL injection signatures
symbols.failure_mode: Injects malicious queries via unsecured input.

symbols.name: Defense: Query Hardening
symbols.role: Enforces parameterized queries and strict input validation.
symbols.failure_mode: Use parameterized queries; strict validation.

symbols.name: Cyber Security Attack Vectors Lattice
symbols.role: Aggregates all identified attack vectors and seeds of compromise.
symbols.failure_mode: Incomplete threat landscape visibility.

symbols.name: Cyber Security Defense Protocols Lattice
symbols.role: Aggregates all defense, repair, and stabilization protocols.
symbols.failure_mode: Ineffective or missing remediation steps.

symbols.name: Attack: Phishing Attempt
symbols.role: Detects deceptive communications intended to harvest credentials.
symbols.failure_mode: User cred harvest via deceptive comms remains undetected

symbols.name: Attack: Ransomware Lock
symbols.role: Detects the encryption of critical assets and ransom demands.
symbols.failure_mode: Critical assets encrypted; ransom demanded

symbols.name: Defense: Privileged Oversight
symbols.role: Represents the defense mechanism of monitoring and restricting privileged user actions.
symbols.failure_mode: Privileged abuse continues unchecked

symbols.name: Defense: Recursive Dampening
symbols.role: Represents the defense mechanism of dampening recursive loops.
symbols.failure_mode: Anomaly continues recursive growth

symbols.name: Defense: Identity Challenge
symbols.role: Represents the defense mechanism of challenging identity at transitions.
symbols.failure_mode: Midstream substitution remains possible

symbols.name: Defense: Micro-Drain Containment
symbols.role: Represents the defense mechanism of containing slow data leaks.
symbols.failure_mode: Micro-leak continues; boundary weak

symbols.name: Defense: Signal Origin Validation
symbols.role: Represents the defense mechanism of validating the origin of control signals.
activation_conditions: Gate all control through origin beacons.
symbols.failure_mode: Injected control remains indistinguishable from legitimate

symbols.name: Defense: Corridor Sealing
symbols.role: Represents the defense mechanism of mapping and sealing blind corridors.
symbols.failure_mode: Uncharted path stays open; oversight absent

symbols.name: Security Processes Lattice
symbols.role: Aggregates and orchestrates operational security processes.
symbols.failure_mode: Fragmented processes leading to security gaps.

symbols.name: Threat Hunter
symbols.role: Proactive threat hunter searching for latent adversaries.

activation_conditions: When latent threats or anomalies are suspected.
persona.function: Proactively hunts for latent threats and anomalies.

activation_conditions: When latent threats or anomalies are suspected.
symbols.failure_mode: Dormant adversary remains undetected

symbols.name: Red Team Operator
symbols.role: Simulates adversarial behavior to validate defenses.

persona.function: Simulates adversarial attacks to test defenses.
fallback_behavior: Halt operation if risk exceeds safety threshold

symbols.failure_mode: Defense remains untested against realistic threats

symbols.name: SOC Analyst
symbols.role: Operational analyst processing security alerts.
activation_conditions: Validate the signal; act on the threat.
symbols.failure_mode: Critical alerts ignored; compromise undetected

symbols.name: Forensic Analyst
symbols.role: Reconstructs security narratives from forensic evidence.

persona.function: Reconstructs security events from artifacts and logs.

symbols.failure_mode: Reconstruction accepts phantom entries as truth

symbols.name: Resonance Recall Lattice
symbols.role: Restores signal integrity and resonance.
symbols.failure_mode: Post-compromise channels remain out-of-tune

symbols.name: Sovereign Arc Lattice
symbols.role: Enforces object sovereignty and boundary control.
symbols.failure_mode: Object sovereignty can be reassigned without proof

symbols.name: Source Verification
symbols.role: Verifies the source of communications.
symbols.failure_mode: Sender spoof remains undetected; secrets at risk

symbols.name: Reactive Remediation
symbols.role: Process of addressing security issues post-discovery.
symbols.failure_mode: Slow response time, incomplete fixes.

symbols.name: Dependency Audit
symbols.role: Security review of third-party dependencies.
symbols.failure_mode: Introduction of known vulnerabilities.

symbols.name: Risk-Based Penetration Testing
symbols.role: Dynamic security testing based on risk assessment.
symbols.failure_mode: Missed vulnerabilities in complex attack paths.

symbols.name: Vulnerability Risk Analysis
symbols.role: Structured assessment of vulnerability risk.
symbols.failure_mode: Inconsistent risk assessments.

symbols.name: Routine Last-Minute Project Securing
symbols.role: Process for security intervention close to deployment when earlier engagement was not possible.
symbols.failure_mode: Missed vulnerabilities; cultural erosion of security.

symbols.name: Violation: No Security Tooling
symbols.role: Records the deployment of code to production without security tooling or review.
symbols.failure_mode: Unchecked code in production; compliance failure.

symbols.name: Critical Untenable Vulnerability
symbols.role: Defines a vulnerability so severe it poses an unacceptable risk level, mandating immediate blocks.
symbols.failure_mode: Catastrophic incident if ignored.

symbols.name: MFA Enforcement
symbols.role: Enforces multi-factor authentication to mitigate credential theft.
symbols.failure_mode: Single-factor auth remains; phish still viable

symbols.name: Account Lockdown
symbols.role: Automatically revokes access and enforces MFA on compromised accounts.
symbols.failure_mode: Compromised accounts remain active

symbols.name: Attack: Malicious Spam
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of malicious spam campaigns distributing malware.
activation_conditions: Detection of high-volume email inflow with suspicious attachments
User reports of unsolicited mail containing links
Filter, sandbox, and detonate suspicious mail.
symbols.failure_mode: Email spam with malware links/attachments.

symbols.name: Defense: Mail Detonation
symbols.role: Represents the defense mechanism of sandboxing and detonating suspicious email artifacts.
symbols.failure_mode: Sandbox attachments; detonate links before delivery.

symbols.name: Attack: DNS Tunnel
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of data exfiltration or C2 via DNS tunneling.
activation_conditions: High volume of DNS queries to a single domain
Anomalous payload sizes in DNS requests
symbols.failure_mode: Exfiltration hidden in symbol_domain queries

symbols.name: Defense: DNS Query Inspection
symbols.role: Represents the defense mechanism of deep inspection of DNS queries to block tunneling.
activation_conditions: Inspect domain requests for payload anomalies.
symbols.failure_mode: Data exfiltration continues via DNS

symbols.name: Defense: Session Invalidation
symbols.role: Represents the defense mechanism of forcefully invalidating compromised sessions.
symbols.failure_mode: Invalidate stolen sessions; require MFA re-auth.

symbols.name: Defense: Kernel Restore
symbols.role: Represents the defense mechanism of restoring system integrity from trusted media.
symbols.failure_mode: Boot from trusted media and restore kernel.

symbols.name: Attack: Data Exfiltration
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of unauthorized data transfer from a system.
symbols.failure_mode: Outbound sensitive flows bypass detection

symbols.name: Attack: C2 Beacon
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of Command and Control beaconing.
symbols.failure_mode: Command-and-control persists; attacker maintains foothold

symbols.name: Defense: C2 Takedown
symbols.role: Represents the defense mechanism of disrupting Command and Control infrastructure.
activation_conditions: Sinkhole indicators; rotate creds; reimage if needed.
symbols.failure_mode: C2 routes remain reachable

symbols.name: Attack: Lateral Movement
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of moving laterally through a compromised network.
activation_conditions: Access to shared resources from new hosts
symbols.failure_mode: Compromised host pivots across network unchecked

symbols.name: Defense: Network Segmentation
symbols.role: Represents the defense mechanism of segmenting the network to contain threats.
activation_conditions: Apply least-trust zones; enforce east-west controls.
symbols.failure_mode: Flat network enables lateral spread

symbols.name: Defense: Virtual Patching
symbols.role: Represents the defense mechanism of applying temporary mitigations (virtual patches).
symbols.failure_mode: Deploy temporary fix; monitor for exploitation.

symbols.name: Attack: Insider Threat
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of malicious or negligent insider actions.
activation_conditions: Access to sensitive data outside business hours
symbols.failure_mode: Privileged actor abuses role for harm

symbols.name: Attack: Man-in-the-Middle
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of intercepting and modifying communications.
symbols.failure_mode: Intercepts and modifies communication between two trusted parties.

symbols.name: Defense: E2E Encryption Enforcement
symbols.role: Represents the defense mechanism of enforcing end-to-end encryption and mutual authentication.
symbols.failure_mode: Enforce end-to-end encryption with mutual auth.

symbols.name: Attack: Cross-Site Scripting
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of injecting malicious scripts into trusted web pages.
symbols.failure_mode: Untrusted script executes in trusted context

symbols.name: Attack: Cross-Site Request Forgery
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of tricking users into executing unwanted actions.
activation_conditions: Require authentic origin and anti-forgery tokens.
symbols.failure_mode: Unwitting user action triggers privileged state change

symbols.name: Attack: Server-Side Request Forgery
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of inducing a server to make requests to internal or external resources.
activation_conditions: Detect internal SSRF patterns; cordon off egress routes.
symbols.failure_mode: Internal resources reachable via crafted external request

symbols.name: Attack: SIM Swap
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of hijacking a mobile phone number to bypass SMS-based MFA.
activation_conditions: Use phishing-resistant MFA; monitor telephony change.
symbols.failure_mode: Phone number control seized to intercept MFA

symbols.name: Attack: Model Inversion
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of extracting sensitive training data from ML models.
activation_conditions: High frequency of specific queries to ML models
Limit query granularity; monitor for extraction.
symbols.failure_mode: Outputs leak information about training data

symbols.name: Attack: Hardcoded Secrets
symbols.role: Represents the vulnerability of embedding secrets directly in source code.
activation_conditions: Static analysis findings of secrets in code
Move to secret manager; revoke exposed keys.
symbols.failure_mode: Credentials embedded in code/config

symbols.name: Attack: RDP Brute Force
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of brute-forcing Remote Desktop Protocol access.
activation_conditions: Repeated failed login attempts on RDP ports
symbols.failure_mode: Automated login attempts on remote desktop services

symbols.name: Attack: JWT 'none' Algorithm Abuse
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of bypassing authentication using unsigned JWTs.
symbols.failure_mode: Unsigned tokens accepted as valid

symbols.name: Attack: CORS Misconfiguration
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of misconfigured Cross-Origin Resource Sharing.
symbols.failure_mode: Overbroad origins allow unauthorized data access

symbols.name: Attack: DNS Cache Poisoning
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of poisoning DNS caches to redirect traffic.
activation_conditions: Enable DNSSEC validation; distrust stale answers.
symbols.failure_mode: Resolver cache seeded with forged records

symbols.name: Attack: Clipboard Hijacking
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of monitoring or modifying system clipboard contents.
activation_conditions: Monitor clipboard hooks; confirm sensitive pastes.
symbols.failure_mode: Clipboard content intercepted/replaced

symbols.name: Attack: Ghost Ledger
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of inserting phantom entries to mislead audits.
symbols.failure_mode: Phantom entries distort audit trails and story reconstruction

symbols.name: Defense: Ledger Reconciliation
symbols.role: Represents the defense mechanism of reconciling ledgers to purge phantom entries.
activation_conditions: Cross-ledger compare; pin to truth anchor.
symbols.failure_mode: Phantoms still bias the narrative

symbols.name: Attack: Veil Swap
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of substituting a trusted object mid-stream.
symbols.failure_mode: Trusted object substituted midstream without visibility

symbols.name: Attack: Cryptic Fountain
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of slow, covert data leakage.
symbols.failure_mode: Slow micro-drain to unauthorized receivers continues unnoticed

symbols.name: Attack: Thread Puppet
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of injecting unauthorized control signals.
activation_conditions: Trace inbound control; validate origin beacon.
symbols.failure_mode: Injected control signals alter flow without authorization

symbols.name: Attack: Blind Corridor
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of using unmonitored paths for actions.
symbols.failure_mode: Transactions bypass oversight via uncharted path

symbols.name: Attack: Shadow Chamber
symbols.role: Represents the attack vector of creating hidden execution environments.
symbols.failure_mode: Hidden runtime remains unobserved; covert process persists

symbols.name: Living Off The Land Binaries (LOLBins)
symbols.role: Defines the concept of legitimate system binaries or scripts that can be misused by attackers to perform malicious operations.

facets.function: Facilitate attacker operations (e.g., execution, reconnaissance, exfiltration)

symbols.failure_mode: Enhanced logging, whitelisting, or behavioral anomaly detection.

symbols.name: Living Off The Land Attack Pattern
symbols.role: Identifies a cyberattack pattern characterized by the use of legitimate system tools and binaries to execute malicious activities.

facets.topology: Internal system process abuse, lateral movement, data exfiltration

symbols.failure_mode: Detection by behavioral analytics, enhanced logging, or privilege restriction.

symbols.name: Living Off The Land Mitigation
symbols.role: Describes strategies and actions to prevent, detect, and respond to Living Off The Land attack techniques.

facets.function: Attack surface reduction, early detection, containment
facets.topology: Endpoint security, network segmentation, identity and access management

symbols.failure_mode: Incomplete policy enforcement, blind spots in monitoring, insufficient privilege segregation.

symbols.name: Structured Risk Assessment Worksheet
symbols.role: Standardized tool for systematically recording and assessing vulnerability risks.
symbols.failure_mode: Incomplete information, inconsistent assessments.

symbols.name: CVSS-Driven Risk Quantification
symbols.role: Technique for quantitatively assessing vulnerability severity using CVSS.
symbols.failure_mode: Misinterpretation of scores without context.

symbols.name: Requirement: Actual Evidence of Exploit
symbols.role: Mandatory requirement to demonstrate a working exploit as proof of vulnerability.
symbols.failure_mode: False positives, inability to replicate.

symbols.name: Incident Commander
symbols.role: Coordinates response actors and stabilizes the lattice during incidents (Persona)

persona.name: Incident Commander
persona.role: Coordinates response actors and stabilizes the lattice during incidents.

facets.function: Govern real-time security incident response and coordination.
facets.commit: Refactored for unified coordination and canonical ID.

symbols.failure_mode: Response fragmented; recovery delayed

symbols.name: Offline Restore
symbols.role: Initiates restoration from clean offline backups in response to ransomware.
symbols.failure_mode: Encrypted assets remain inaccessible

symbols.name: OAuth Token Theft
symbols.role: Seed pattern for OAuth token theft scenarios.
activation_conditions: Step-up auth; rotate and narrow scopes.
symbols.failure_mode: Bearer token intercepted/reused outside consented scope

symbols.name: Threat Intelligence Lattice
symbols.role: Aggregates and correlates global threat signals to enhance local defensive posture.

facets.function: Ingest and correlate global threat indicators to guide defense.
facets.commit: Refactored for global signal integration and canonical ID.

activation_conditions: To enrich local detection with global security signals.
During threat modeling to identify emerging actor tactics and techniques.
symbols.failure_mode: Ingestion of stale or poisoned indicators leading to false sense of security.

symbols.name: Root Reclaim Pattern
symbols.role: Pattern for systemic recovery and kernel truth reclamation after total trust collapse.

facets.function: Systemic recovery and kernel truth reclamation

symbols.failure_mode: Collapse of kernel trust without valid rebuild lineage.

symbols.name: Phishing Lure
symbols.role: Seed pattern for phishing lures.
symbols.failure_mode: Crafted comms bypass trust filters; secrets leaked

symbols.name: Provenance Governance Lattice
symbols.role: Governs the origin and integrity of symbolic objects across systems (cyber/sec) and conversation patterns (human_factors)
symbols.failure_mode: Origins of symbolic objects remain unverifiable
